reasoning: 8x zoom inspection reveals: (1) Outline inconsistency — right blade edge drops from 1px to missing in 2-3 spots, and left edge shows a 2px segment near the guard junction. (2) Fire-base noise — 3-4 stray orange/brown pixels scatter into background in the lower flame cluster that don't align with any intentional dither pattern. (3) Color bleed — cyan guard bleeds one pixel diagonally into the gold blade body at top-left corner of guard, suggesting soft-blend generation rather than hard-placed pixel. (4) Blade shading asymmetry — left bevel of blade is 2 tones (dark gold + highlight), right bevel is 1 tone for roughly 40% of blade length, inconsistent with a hand-crafted approach. Positive findings: background is clean, no sub-pixel AA smearing on most edges, semantic read (blade/guard/pommel/fire) is coherent, primary palette is disciplined 3-tone gold. Severity is minor but accumulates across 4 categories; borderline marginal/fail.
